situational_context: Running comeback Day 66 (14 runs since May 3). ACWR normalized to 1.06 (was 1.35 on Jun 14) — safe zone. HRV 7d avg recovered to 37 ms (was 35). VO2max running 41.5 (from 38.3 at comeback start). Longest demonstrated run: 7.5 km (Run #12, Jun 21). Most recent: Run #14, 6.0 km on Jul 5 (suffer 30, well-tolerated). Paris under canicule orange alert Jul 8-11 (33-38°C), all outdoor training RED zone. Traveling to Saint-Malo (Brittany coast) Jul 12 — 20-23°C Green/Yellow conditions will allow Run #15 on Jul 13. Training status back to Maintaining after Detraining dip late June. E-bike commuting on sur-site days. Weight 103.67 kg (single reading Jun 21 — weigh-in adherence low). Vitamin D retest overdue (was due Jul 2026). No new labs since Dec 2025.

recommendations.text: Resume running at Saint-Malo Monday Jul 13 — Run #15, 6-7 km Z2 bord de mer. ACWR safe (1.06), readiness HIGH (89), HRV recovered. Anchor to demonstrated 6 km tolerance (Run #14); allow natural extension to 7 km. Coastal 20-23°C = Green/Yellow zone — first real outdoor opportunity in 2 weeks.
recommendations.measurable: Run #15 completed 6-7 km, avg HR ≤145, no tissue pain >24h post

recommendations.text: Schedule Vitamin D retest blood panel — now overdue (was due Jul 2026, last value 27 ng/mL in Dec 2025). Arrange at Saint-Malo or upon return to Paris. Target ≥40 ng/mL.
Restore weekly weigh-in consistency — only 1 Withings reading in 28 days (Jun 21: 103.67 kg). Pesée Withings event on Jul 12 is set. Weight trend is untrackable without data.
recommendations.measurable: Withings reading logged Jul 12 + weekly thereafter
